description_long: This flower shop is a small, standalone building with a gabled dark gray roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs. The front features a porch with railings and steps leading up to the entrance, giving it a welcoming, residential feel. The windows are symmetrically placed, and the structure is compact, with a rectangular footprint. The landscaping includes several green and flowering trees, some with pink blossoms, arranged in a loose semicircle around the shop. The overall setting suggests a quaint, suburban or small-town location, with the shop nestled among greenery. No visible signage, window displays, or exterior flower arrangements are present on the building itself.
description: A small, light-colored flower shop with a gabled roof, front porch, and surrounded by green and flowering trees. The building has a cozy, residential appearance and is set in a landscaped area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, entrance, and symmetrical windows, with trees and flowering shrubs on both sides.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the building, the side wall, and the arrangement of trees around the shop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal features, and a clear view of the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back and side of the building, with trees and flowering shrubs visible in the background.
